falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5,200 (10% above current level) within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A clear bullish breakout would invalidate the 'HOLD' signal and suggest the pattern is not a bottom but a continuation of an uptrend

falsification_conditions.condition: The 14-day moving average of the VIX drops below 12 (its lowest level since January 2023)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Extremely low volatility would contradict the 'blowoff score' of 39, indicating no imminent reversal or panic selling

falsification_conditions.condition: The CBOE Put/Call ratio falls below 0.65 (its lowest level in 2024)
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Extreme bullish sentiment would falsify the 'UNKNOWN' verdict by showing market participants are not preparing for a downturn

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
